CLIP 84"our planet will die"
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @PlazaPalacio — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. The balcony, the day's light feeling subtly colder as he speaks.
Characters: @Vorthan.
Shot/lens: medium on @Vorthan delivering the prophecy.
Camera: a slow push.
Light: daylight that seems to lose warmth as the words land.
Action: @Vorthan spreads his hands and foretells the planet's slow death, each phrase weighted to spread fear, the crowd below going silent and stricken beneath him.
Dialogue (@Vorthan): "Without it, the light will fade. The water will fade. Our planet will die."
Mood: doom, weaponized.
Audio: SFX only — his voice, an uneasy crowd murmur. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 85los aliados en jaulas
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @PlazaPalacio — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. Beside and below the balcony, captured allies displayed in cages as a grim spectacle.
Characters: @Vorthan, captured allies (resistance pilots like @Piloto1, @Piloto2, @Piloto3).
Shot/lens: wide revealing the caged, beaten allies behind/below him.
Camera: a slow lateral move past the cages.
Light: harsh daylight falling on the prisoners.
Action: the camera drifts across rows of cages flanking the balcony where the allies who saved @StellaPeloCorto stand captured and defeated, displayed to the crowd as proof — beaten but unbloodied — while @Vorthan gestures to them as traitors.
Mood: cruel theater.
Audio: SFX only — chains shifting, a low crowd murmur. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 86el amor se vuelve odio
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @PlazaPalacio — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. Down among the crowd, faces filling the frame as the mood turns.
Characters: the crowd.
Shot/lens: a montage of faces in the crowd shifting from grief to rage in real time.
Camera: quick pushes across individual faces.
Light: daylight hardening, shadows sharpening.
Action: the camera moves through the crowd catching faces mid-transformation — grief tightening into anger, tears drying into snarls, fists clenching — a people's love curdling into hatred before our eyes.
Mood: the birth of a scapegoat.
Audio: SFX only — murmurs swelling into scattered angry shouts. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.

CLIP 87"Stella. Thief. Traitor."
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @PlazaPalacio — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. The balcony, the King delivering the verdict to a turning crowd.
Characters: @Vorthan.
Shot/lens: strong close on @Vorthan delivering the name like a sentence.
Camera: a push to his calm, cruel face.
Light: daylight, his eyes cold beneath the grief-mask.
Action: @Vorthan lets the silence build, then hands the crowd their enemy — the name landing like a verdict, his sorrow never slipping even as the plaza erupts in fury beneath him.
Dialogue (@Vorthan): "And who condemned us? One of our own. Stella. Thief. Traitor."
Mood: the lie sealed.
Audio: SFX only — his voice, then the crowd roaring Stella's name in hatred. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.

CLIP 88Vorthan acaricia a la bebé (cierre)
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @PlazaPalacio — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. The balcony above the roaring plaza, the King holding a small child before the multitude.
Characters: @Vorthan, @SelkaBebe (grey-blue eyes).
Shot/lens: @Vorthan holds @SelkaBebe before the crowd and, almost imperceptibly, strokes her head like a father; then to black.
Camera: a slow push to the tender-yet-wrong gesture, then a fade to black.
Light: bright day whose warmth now feels like a lie.
Action: above the roaring crowd, @Vorthan lifts @SelkaBebe so all can see her, and — almost too small to notice — gently strokes her white hair like a doting father, the baby's grey-blue eyes blinking up at him; the image holds, intimate and deeply wrong, then cuts to black. END OF ACT 1.
Mood: intimate dread, the seed of everything to come.
Audio: SFX only — the roaring crowd fading out, a soft breath, then silence. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

ACTO 2 86 clips

10 — ESCENA: La nave nodriza / "te recogí" · *(89-95)*

CLIP 89establishing de la nodriza
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @NaveNodriza — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. A vast dark cargo bay of an ancient mothership; cold metal ribs, dim amber work-lights, @NaveStella's wrecked hull clamped in mechanical arms like caught prey.
Shot/lens: wide establishing of the cavernous bay.
Camera: slow drift through the gloom toward the wreck.
Light: low amber pools, deep shadow.
Action: the camera glides through the immense, silent bay, revealing @NaveStella broken and held in the claws of something far older and bigger than anything on Erdia.
Mood: alien, ominous, small.
Audio: SFX only — deep hull groans, dripping metal, a low hum. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 90Stella despierta
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @NaveNodriza — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. The cold bay floor.
Characters: @StellaPeloCorto. Props: @Orbe, @LlaveDeLuz.
Shot/lens: close on @StellaPeloCorto waking, disoriented.
Camera: a slow push as she checks her hand first.
Light: dim amber on her face.
Action: @StellaPeloCorto jolts awake on the metal floor; before anything else her eyes snap to her palm — the @LlaveDeLuz still glows, the @Orbe still inside — and a flicker of relief crosses her exhausted face.
Mood: disoriented, relief, grief beneath.
Audio: SFX only — her gasp, distant hull hum. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 90Ael duelo al despertar
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @NaveNodriza — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters: @StellaPeloCorto.
Shot/lens: primerísimo plano on her face.
Camera: slow push as grief crashes in.
Light: dim amber on wet eyes.
Action: as she registers where she is, the grief of the escape crashes back over @StellaPeloCorto — her mother, the allies — her face crumpling before she forces it flat, utterly alone in a strange universe.
Mood: raw grief, isolation.
Audio: SFX only — a caught sob, distant hull hum. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 91aparece Theron
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @NaveNodriza — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. The shadowed bay.
Characters: @Theron, @StellaPeloCorto.

Camera: slow push to his unblinking eyes.
Light: he steps half into the amber light, ageless and still.
Action: a vast shadow shifts in the gloom and @Theron steps forward — tall, of another species, eyes that never blink, centuries worn into his face; @StellaPeloCorto scrambles back on guard.
Mood: dread, awe.
Audio: SFX only — heavy quiet steps, her sharp breath. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 92"I picked you up"
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @NaveNodriza — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters: @Theron, @StellaPeloCorto.
Shot/lens: shot-reverse between them.
Camera: steady, cold.
Light: amber on her, shadow on him.
Action: @StellaPeloCorto, broken-voiced, asks if he saved her; @Theron answers without warmth.
Dialogue (@StellaPeloCorto): "Where am I? Did you save me?" — (@Theron): "No. I picked you up. There's a difference."
Mood: cold, transactional.
Audio: SFX only — hull hum, low voices. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 93"what shines can be followed"
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @NaveNodriza — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters: @Theron, @StellaPeloCorto. Props: @Orbe.
Shot/lens: close on Theron eyeing the glow in her hand.
Camera: slow push to the Orb's light under her skin.
Light: the @Orbe casting glow on both faces.
Action: @Theron's gaze locks onto the light pulsing in her palm as he speaks, reading her like a trail rather than a person.
Dialogue (@Theron): "What you carry inside shines. And what shines like that… can be followed."
Mood: predatory calm.
Audio: SFX only — low hum, his measured voice. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 99AStella aguanta (acción ×2)
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters: @StellaPeloCorto, @Vosk.
Shot/lens: tight, her ducking and countering.
Camera: whip-pans tracking her evasions.
Motion: very high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Light: harsh, sweat catching light.
Action: @StellaPeloCorto ducks two haymakers and lands a quick three-hit combo on @Vosk's ribs — it barely moves him, but her face is pure refusal-to-quit; he wipes his mouth, almost impressed.
Mood: defiance.
Audio: SFX only — rapid blows, breath, a surprised grunt. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 101Nima ("dos formas de romperse")
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. A cluttered workbench corner.
Characters: @Nima, @StellaPeloCorto, @Brog.
Shot/lens: medium on @Nima, four hands working without looking up.
Camera: gentle, settling.
Light: warm workbench glow.
Action: @Nima, four arms busy at once, talks to @StellaPeloCorto without lifting her eyes; @Brog sits down beside the girl in silence.
Dialogue (@Nima): "Don't mind Vosk. He barks so he won't think. Two ways to break, kid — the one that cries, and the one that fixes things at 3am. Guess which I am."
Mood: the first warmth, found family.
Audio: SFX only — tools, a soft mechanical hum. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 103la dilatación 1:4
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters: @Theron, @StellaPeloCorto.
Shot/lens: close two-shot, the cruel truth landing.
Camera: slow push to her face as it sinks in.
Light: cold.
Action: @Theron tells her the worst part flatly; @StellaPeloCorto's face slowly registers the size of it — every day lost here is four lost at home.
Dialogue (@Theron): "Time doesn't run the same here. One year of yours… is four back home."
Mood: dread, a silent clock.
Audio: SFX only — low hum, a held breath. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

12 — ESCENA: [AÑO 8] La resistencia / Marek / la encapuchada · *(104-108)*

CLIP 104establishing Erdia se pudre
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. RÓTULO ERDIA · AÑO 8. The once-golden city greyed by fog and scaffolds, the luzagua canals running thin and dull, mining smoke smudging the sky.
Shot/lens: wide establishing of the decaying city.
Camera: slow mournful drift over the rot.
Light: grey, smoke-filtered, the gold dying.
Action: the camera glides over Erdia eight years on — the warm gold gone grey, light-water guttering, machinery and smoke where gardens used to be.
Mood: decay, loss.
Audio: SFX only — distant machinery, wind, a thin sick hum. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 106Marek: ¿una niña vació un planeta?
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @RefugioResistencia — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters: @Marek, resistance.
Shot/lens: medium, intercut with nodding faces.
Camera: steady.
Light: warm lamplight.
Action: @Marek plants the doubt that holds them together; the people nod, given a different enemy.
Dialogue (@Marek): "Did a fourteen-year-old empty a whole planet? Or did someone need us to hate someone?"
Mood: quiet defiance.
Audio: SFX only — his voice, low agreement. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.

CLIP 125la salva / "porque no soy tú"
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @FosaApuestas — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters: @StellaPeloCorto, @Vosk.
Shot/lens: she breaks the platform, deflects the device, hauls him up.
Camera: impact + push to Vosk's stunned face.
Motion: very high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Light: sparks, the deflected energy flaring.
Action: @StellaPeloCorto smashes the platform, knocks the energy device aside and drags @Vosk to his feet; he stares at her, uncomprehending.
Dialogue (@Vosk): "I sold you. Why—?" — (@StellaPeloCorto): "Because I'm not you."
Mood: grace over vengeance.
Audio: SFX only — crashing platform, deflected blast, his stunned breath. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.

CLIP 134casi lo arranca / "más útil respirando"
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters: @Theron, @StellaPeloCorto. Props: @Orbe.
Shot/lens: his hand drifts toward the Orb; she holds her breath; he stops.
Camera: tense micro push, then release.
Light: Orb-glow, his eyes calculating.
Action: @Theron's hand moves as if to tear it out; @StellaPeloCorto goes rigid — then he reads how it's woven into her blood and pulls back.
Dialogue (@Theron): "Forcing it out would kill you. You're more useful breathing."
Mood: cold restraint.
Audio: SFX only — a held breath, low hum. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Shot/lens: wide of the misty mines, the hooded figure slipping through.
Camera: slow drift through fog.
Light: cold, foggy, lamp-glow.
Action: in the fog-mines of Year 14, @VeraEncapuchada slips between columns of slaves, searching face after face.
Mood: grim, searching.
Audio: SFX only — chains, drips, a low mine drone. No music.

Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.

CLIP 146establishing aposentos / Marek en la puerta

Setting: the location shown in @AposentosGeneral — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. The General's cold, perfect quarters — a child raised into a weapon.

CLIP 149Selka ataca / Vera no la hiere
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @AposentosGeneral — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters: @SelkaGeneral (grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye), @VeraEncapuchada (grey-blue eyes).
Shot/lens: Selka attacks; Vera only blocks and retreats.
Camera: kinetic but anguished handheld.
Motion: very high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Light: cold, blade-light streaks.
Action: @SelkaGeneral attacks in a flurry; @VeraEncapuchada only blocks, parries, gives ground — she cannot bring herself to strike her own daughter.
Dialogue (@VeraEncapuchada): "I won't hurt you. I can't. Look at me."
Mood: a heartbreaking non-fight.
Audio: SFX only — blade clashes, ragged breath. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 154la creen asesina / la nana
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @AposentosGeneral — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.

ACTO 3 86 clips

21 — ESCENA: [AÑO 20] El regreso · *(155-164)*

CLIP 155establishing Erdia ruinas
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. RÓTULO ERDIA · AÑO 20. The golden city now grey and broken in two — fog, soldiers, towering murals of the King over rubble.
Shot/lens: wide establishing over the ruined city.
Camera: slow mournful crane over the grey.
Light: cold, smoke-filtered, gold long dead.
Action: the camera glides over Erdia twenty years on — a grey, fractured city under fog, imperial murals looming above rubble where gardens used to be.
Mood: ruin, dread.
Audio: SFX only — wind, distant patrols, a sick low hum. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 158el odio del pueblo / "por eso volví"
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. A grey market street.
Characters: @StellaTeñida, @Noah.
Shot/lens: they move through hostile stares; an old man spits.
Camera: handheld through the crowd, then close two-shot.
Light: grey, hard faces.
Action: @StellaTeñida moves through the crowd under the hatred the King taught them — an old man spits at her name; @Noah leans in.
Dialogue (@Noah): "A whole planet hates you. And you still came back." — (@StellaTeñida): "That's why I came back."
Mood: resolve against the world.
Audio: SFX only — hostile murmurs, a spit, wind. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 161Korin la reconoce (la conoció de pequeña)
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters: @Korin, @StellaTeñida.
Shot/lens: he studies her face; an old memory surfaces and breaks him.
Camera: slow push to his face as recognition dawns.
Light: grey, a softening on his weathered face.
Action: then, under the dyed hair, @Korin recognizes her face — the little girl he knew twenty years ago, always at her mother's side; his aim drops, his voice cracking.
Dialogue (@Korin): "Stella…? I knew you when you were small — always at your mother's side. It's you. You came back."
Mood: reunion, disbelief.
Audio: SFX only — his breaking voice, lowered weapons. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 163EN ÓRBITA: Vosk ruega bajar
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. The nodriza bridge, Erdia boiling on the viewport.
Characters: @Vosk, @Theron.
Shot/lens: Vosk at the viewport, Theron behind.
Camera: slow push between them.
Light: cold bridge glow, planet-light.
Action: in orbit @Vosk watches Erdia churn and turns to @Theron; the hunter doesn't agree — but doesn't stop him.
Dialogue (@Vosk): "Let me go down. She's alone." — (@Theron): "Not our war." — (@Vosk): "It became mine the day she pulled me out of that pit."
Mood: loyalty earned.
Audio: SFX only — bridge hum, his low voice. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Setting: the location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.

23 — ESCENA: La guerra / rescatan a Naio / la cúpula · *(171-178)* · **SET-PIECE A6**

CLIP 171estalla el asalto
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background. The fog-streets erupting into war.
Characters: resistance, @RobotImperial.
Shot/lens: wide as the assault detonates across the streets.
Camera: kinetic, in the chaos.
Motion: very high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Light: energy-fire lacing the fog.
Action: the resistance assault erupts across the grey fog-streets — naieli surging against imperial robots, the war begins in a storm of energy-light and dust.
Mood: chaos, uprising.
Audio: SFX only — energy fire, shouts, collapsing stone. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 183"¿por qué mataste a nuestra madre?"
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.

Action: @StellaTeñida's question cuts deeper than any blow; in her hesitation @SelkaGeneral knocks her to the floor, blade rising.

Mood: gut-wound.
Audio: SFX only — a hard takedown, her gasp. No music.

CLIP 202"no había resistencia, solo yo"

CLIP 204"fui yo, vistiendo tu rostro"

Setting: the location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.

Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.

Audio: SFX only — a titanic roar, groaning structure. No music.
Negative: no blood, no gore, no guns, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Mood: grim purpose, the hook for Peli 2.

CLIP 227la mano en el cristal
Style: Satoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Setting: the location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; lush, detailed, painterly background.

Mood: aching hope — the river motif closing its circle.
